name: Oat Bran Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the oil, brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract. Mix until well blended.
2. Stir in the rolled oats, oat bran, flour, salt, and baking soda until evenly distributed.
3. Fold in the raisins or chocolate chips and nuts, ensuring an even distribution of ingredients.
4. Scoop tablespoon-sized portions of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes at 350°F (180°C), or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and transfer to a wire rack to cool.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
